entries.rules: cannot walk on water tiles
requires 2 wood in inventory; must be facing an unoccupied grass or path tile; crafting table is placed on the tile being faced
requires crafting table; must be adjacent to the table; use MAKE_WOOD_PICKAXE action
requires crafting table placed in the world; agent must be adjacent to the table; at least 1 wood in inventory
wood pickaxe can mine stone blocks
use wood pickaxe to mine stone; requires being adjacent to stone block and having wood pickaxe in inventory
requires crafting table; must be adjacent to table; use MAKE_STONE_PICKAXE action
requires crafting table placed in world; agent adjacent to table; 2 stone and 1 wood in inventory
can be gathered by hand; no tool required; use DO action when adjacent to tree; yields +1 wood per action
coal can be mined with stone_pickaxe or better; requires being adjacent and facing the coal block; use DO action
mined using stone_pickaxe or higher-tier pickaxe; yields 1-2 coal per block
use DO action while facing iron ore block; requires stone-tier or better pickaxe in inventory
locate iron ore block; move adjacent; ensure stone_pickaxe or better is equipped; face block and use DO action
coal and iron ore require at least a stone-tier pickaxe to mine; wood pickaxe is insufficient
Solid resource blocks (like coal, iron ore) block movement; must be mined first to pass through the tile
must craft using PLACE_FURNACE action while facing an unoccupied grass or path tile
requires 8 stone and at least 1 coal in inventory; agent must face an unoccupied grass or path tile
requires crafting table placed and agent adjacent; furnace must be adjacent to crafting table; use MAKE_IRON_PICKAXE action
requires agent adjacent to crafting table, furnace adjacent to table, 1 iron and 1 wood in inventory
cannot walk on tree tiles; tree tiles are solid and block movement
